message:
✨ Android TV D-pad navigation for Smart Channels, Settings, Shows

* ✨ Add D-pad navigation to Smart Channels + optimize splash for TV

Smart Channel rows in both channel list and EPG guide were unreachable
on Android TV because they used InkWell/GestureDetector without Focus
wrappers. Add Focus with key handlers to all Smart Channel UI:

Channel list:
- Group rows: CENTER→play, RIGHT→expand, LEFT→collapse/sidebar
- Member rows: CENTER→play specific member, LEFT→sidebar
- Both: contextMenu/F5→show group/member actions
- Focus ring (purple tint + border) matches existing channel rows

EPG guide:
- Group rows: CENTER→play, RIGHT→expand, LEFT→collapse
- Member rows: CENTER→play specific member
- Both: contextMenu/F5→show actions
- Focus highlight (purple tint + thicker left border)

Splash screen:
- Skip CustomPaint (glow painter, waves painter) on Android TV
- Don't create _glowController loop (saves continuous GPU work)
- Replace Shimmer title with plain white text on TV
- Reduce animation from 3.5s to 2s on TV
- Budget TV GPUs (Mali-400/PowerVR) can't handle per-frame
  RadialGradient + CustomPaint without stuttering

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add TV remote multi-select for Smart Channel creation

On Android TV, users had no way to enter multi-select mode since
there's no Shift key on a standard remote (Fire Stick, Chromecast).

Channel list view:
- Long-press CENTER (>400ms) enters multi-select mode
- Short CENTER toggles selection when in multi-select
- BACK exits multi-select mode
- MENU/contextMenu/F5 also toggles multi-select
- onLongPress on InkWell enters multi-select on TV (fullscreen on desktop)

EPG guide view:
- Same long-press CENTER / short CENTER / BACK behavior
- MENU/contextMenu/F5 toggle multi-select
- onLongPress on GestureDetector enters multi-select on TV

Multi-select bar:
- Wrapped in FocusTraversalGroup for D-pad navigation
- All buttons (Cancel, Add to Smart Channel, New Smart Channel)
  wrapped with Focus + Builder for focus ring visibility
- White border appears on focused buttons
- 'New Smart Channel' button autofocuses on TV

Timer cleanup:
- _longPressTimer disposed in dispose() method
- Timer cancelled on KeyUp to prevent stale callbacks

Tested on AVD TV_1080p: long-press → select 3 channels → tap
New Smart Channel → soft keyboard appears → type name → ENTER →
Smart Channel created with confirmation snackbar.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Settings & Shows D-pad navigation for Android TV

- Settings: Fix autofocus stealing focus from ListTiles on TV
- Settings: API key cards start collapsed on Android TV
- Settings: Add FocusTraversalGroup and auto-save on field submit
- Shows: Fix ChoiceChip tabs using SingleChildScrollView for focus traversal
- Shows: Add Focus wrapper to poster cards with purple focus border
- Shows: Fix BACK navigation (context.go → context.push) so BACK
  returns to grid instead of exiting app
- Theme: Increase focusColor opacity for better TV visibility

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+             event.logicalKey == LogicalKeyboardKey.gameButtonA)) {
+          onTap();
+          return KeyEventResult.handled;
+        }
+        return KeyEventResult.ignored;
